pageContext.name: VF-0S Phoenix (Roy Focker Use)
pageContext.description: From the 2002 direct-to-video anime 'Macross Zero', Roy Focker's VF-0S Phoenix joins the Hi-Metal R series!  Featuring a full transformation into all three modes: Figher, Gerwalk, and Battroid, it also includes FAST packs and air-to-air missiles. This collectible figure comes decorated with Focker's personal colors and skull marking, as well as multiple accessories.  Don't miss your chance to add the VS-0S Phoenix to your collection today!
